query:
SELECT s.id, s.code, s.name, s.displayOrder, s.isActive, s.requestTypeId,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM formFields f WHERE f.sectionId = s.id) as fieldCount
FROM formSections s 
WHERE s.name LIKE '%VIP%' OR s.code LIKE '%vip%';
command:

       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM formFields f WHERE f.sectionId = s.id) as fieldCount
